guide_identity.topic: IR pitching deck for a Silicon Valley AI B2C startup targeting teens and twenty-somethings

project_brief.objective: Create a 15-slide investor pitch deck that explains a youth-focused AI social creation product before native PowerPoint assembly.
constraints: Do not reuse source embedded images.
Do not treat the HTML guide preview as slide content.
Use approved package assets only when a manifest is present and checksums validate.

reference_files.purpose: Human review preview generated from guide data.
reference_files.public_safe_note: Preview is layout evidence only and must not be screenshotted into the deck.

reference_files.purpose: Machine-facing rendering notes mirrored by this JSON packet.
reference_files.public_safe_note: No private paths, Drive identifiers, raw private records, or unapproved assets.

colors.name: Electric Blue
colors.usage: Primary accent for the most important action, section signal, or hero emphasis.
colors.accessibility_note: Use white text on solid Electric Blue for short labels; avoid long body copy on this accent.

colors.name: Signal Pink
colors.usage: Secondary accent for social energy, creator moments, and selected highlights.
colors.accessibility_note: Use sparingly and pair with Ink for nearby explanatory text.

colors.name: Mint
colors.usage: Positive growth, success, and healthy loop indicators.
colors.accessibility_note: Use for icons, chips, and chart accents; pair with Ink text for normal copy.

colors.name: Cloud
colors.usage: Default slide background and low-noise card fill.
colors.accessibility_note: Use Ink for normal text on Cloud.

colors.name: Ink
colors.usage: Primary readable text, dense labels, and outlines.
colors.accessibility_note: Use on Cloud or white backgrounds for accessible normal text.

slides.content_brief: Introduce LumaLoop AI as the social creation loop for mobile-native youth.
visible_content_candidates: AI social creation loops for the next generation

asset_slots.fallback: Render an editable native phone UI mockup.
asset_slots.crop_or_mask_policy: If a real mockup image is approved, fit it inside the mockup bounds with contain behavior and preserve aspect ratio; if using native fallback, build the frame from editable shapes.

slides.content_brief: State the thesis that Gen Z will not experience AI as a blank chat box.
visible_content_candidates: AI will not live in a blank chat box for Gen Z.
qa_checks: Text fits within two title lines

slides.content_brief: Explain three pain points in current AI tools for teen social life.

asset_slots.crop_or_mask_policy: Not applicable for native line icons; if an approved icon file is used, preserve aspect ratio and center within the icon bounds.

slides.content_brief: Show that the target audience creates before it searches.
visible_content_candidates: Gen Z creates before it searches.
Creation is the new intent signal.

asset_slots.fallback: Use a native abstract shape cluster that bleeds only on the right edge.
asset_slots.crop_or_mask_policy: Crop or mask to the right-edge visual bounds; allow visual bleed to the right edge only; keep all text and labels inside the safe area.

slides.content_brief: Reveal the product experience through a phone-focused layout.

asset_slots.fallback: Render a native UI mockup inside the phone screen and report the fallback.
asset_slots.crop_or_mask_policy: Crop approved or generated screen imagery to the phone screen rectangle using cover fit, then mask to the rounded screen shape; never stretch the image; keep UI content inside the screen safe inset.

qa_checks: Required image slot has an approved source or recorded fallback

slides.content_brief: Describe the loop from idea to shareable output in under 60 seconds.
Show three daily habit loops that make the product sticky.
qa_checks: Each use case has title and short body only

slides.content_brief: Frame the youth creation market without overloading the slide.

asset_slots.fallback: Use a solid Cloud background with native circle shapes.
asset_slots.crop_or_mask_policy: If an approved or generated background image is used, crop to full-slide cover, reduce opacity or blur enough for text readability, and keep text contrast compliant.

qa_checks: Market circles do not overlap labels

slides.content_brief: Use three early usage metrics to demonstrate repeat behavior.
qa_checks: Metric role uses the metric typography token

slides.content_brief: Explain freemium creation, paid identity, and marketplace revenue.
qa_checks: Three revenue lanes remain visually distinct

slides.content_brief: Position the product between AI utility and social creation.
Show how creator loops compound through sharing and remixing.
qa_checks: Flywheel is native shapes, not a bitmap unless approved

slides.content_brief: Lay out a phased GTM plan from creator squads to school networks.
qa_checks: Roadmap dates and phases do not collide

slides.content_brief: Summarize efficient growth and creator-led acquisition assumptions.
Close with the funding ask and use of funds.
visible_content_candidates: Own the AI social creation loop
qa_checks: Ask amount remains explicit placeholder if not owner-provided

layout_archetypes.description: Hero title, subtitle, and optional phone mockup.
layout_archetypes.native_assembly_hint: Use text boxes, native phone frame shapes, and optional approved image crop.

layout_archetypes.description: Single dominant thesis statement with supporting microcopy.
layout_archetypes.native_assembly_hint: Use a large text box, optional accent rule, and simple native background shapes; no bitmap is required.

layout_archetypes.description: Three equal cards with short labels and optional icons.
layout_archetypes.native_assembly_hint: Use grouped rectangles, text boxes, and approved icons or native line shapes.

layout_archetypes.description: Behavior-change statement with optional right-edge visual bleed.
layout_archetypes.native_assembly_hint: Use native text boxes, chart-like dots or arrows, and an optional image or shape cluster clipped to a right-edge bleed zone.

layout_archetypes.description: Product reveal with required phone screen slot.
layout_archetypes.native_assembly_hint: Use a native device frame and crop approved or generated image into the screen region.
Use native connectors, arrows, numbered pills, and short text boxes arranged on a horizontal or diagonal path.

layout_archetypes.description: Three habit-forming use cases with equal emphasis.
layout_archetypes.native_assembly_hint: Use three grouped card modules with native icons, concise headings, and short body text.

layout_archetypes.description: Market landscape or TAM/SAM/SOM style sizing view.
layout_archetypes.native_assembly_hint: Use editable circles, labels, and callout shapes; optional background texture must be cropped behind all text.

layout_archetypes.description: Metric row plus short insight text.
layout_archetypes.native_assembly_hint: Use native KPI cards and chart-like shapes.

layout_archetypes.description: Revenue model lanes or monetization components.
layout_archetypes.native_assembly_hint: Use native columns, lane dividers, icons, and short text boxes for each revenue stream.

layout_archetypes.description: Two-axis competitive or category positioning matrix.
layout_archetypes.native_assembly_hint: Use native axis lines, quadrant labels, and positioned marker shapes with accessible labels.

layout_archetypes.description: Compounding loop or network effect sequence.
layout_archetypes.native_assembly_hint: Use curved arrows or segmented circular shapes, short labels, and a center text box.
Use native timeline lines, phase blocks, milestone dots, and compact labels.

layout_archetypes.description: Financial assumptions, forecast, or allocation summary.
layout_archetypes.native_assembly_hint: Use editable table-like shapes, bar charts, and metric callouts instead of flattened images.
Use large text boxes, native allocation blocks or bars, and optional supporting callouts.

notes: The sample HTML phone mockup is a native placeholder, not proof that a reusable asset exists.
Every real file inserted into a deck must come from an approved manifest with checksum evidence.

qa_rules.check: Rendered slides must not show content_guidance, implementation_notes, slot IDs, or layout placeholder labels.
The HTML guide preview must not be screenshotted into the PPTX.
Approved package assets must validate sha256 and size before insertion.

fallback_policy.missing_asset: Use native shape or mockup fallback and report the fallback in final QA.
fallback_policy.font_unavailable: Use the role fallback font and report the font fallback.
fallback_policy.overflow: Summarize text before shrinking below min_pt; fail QA if text still overflows.
